signal_title: Aprobación de la Nueva Ley de Aduanas
risk_rationale: The new Mexican Customs Law focuses on customs oversight and digitalization, which may indirectly affect TikTok's e-commerce and cross-border settlement processes. However, it does not directly impose new requirements on TikTok's operations.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Currency conversion transparency with real-time FX disclosure at checkout.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Enhanced customs oversight and digitalization of customs processes.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Potential need for alignment with digital customs processes for cross-border transactions.

remediations.title: Align Cross-Border Processes with New Customs Digitalization
remediations.description: Evaluate and update cross-border transaction processes to ensure alignment with Mexico's new digital customs requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-border transactions comply with new digital customs processes.
Currency conversion disclosures are updated to reflect any new customs requirements.

business_impact: Minimal direct impact on TikTok's operations, but potential adjustments needed for e-commerce transactions involving customs processes.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed review of the new customs law to identify specific digitalization requirements.
Engage with local legal counsel to understand the implications for e-commerce operations.
Update internal processes and systems to align with any new customs digitalization requirements.
